GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [s_store_name@0 ASC, i_item_desc@1 ASC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[s_store_name@0 ASC, i_item_desc@1 ASC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[s_store_name@0 as s_store_name, i_item_desc@2 as i_item_desc, revenue@1 as revenue, i_current_price@3 as i_current_price, i_wholesale_cost@4 as i_wholesale_cost, i_brand@5 as i_brand]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
        GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(ss_store_sk@1, ss_store_sk@0)], filter=CAST(revenue@0 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) <= CAST(0.1 * CAST(ave@1 AS Float64) AS Decimal128(30, 15)), projection=[0, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_store_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(ss_item_sk@2, i_item_sk@0)], projection=[0, 1, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_item_sk@2], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                        GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_store_sk@0, ss_store_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_store_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=6882960
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_store_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_store_sk@0 as ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk@1 as ss_item_sk, sum(store_sales.ss_sales_price)@2 as revenue]
                                GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_sales_price)]
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_store_sk@0, ss_item_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8

                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                                          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ss_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2, 3, 4]
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                                                  GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_month_seq@1 >= 1176 AND d_month_seq@1 <= 1187, projection=[0]

                                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=6882960
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=6882960
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=6882960
          GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_store_sk@0 as ss_store_sk, avg(sa.revenue)@1 as ave]
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_store_sk], aggr=[avg(sa.revenue)]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_store_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_store_sk], aggr=[avg(sa.revenue)]
                    GpuProjectExec: expr=[ss_store_sk@0 as ss_store_sk, sum(store_sales.ss_sales_price)@2 as revenue]
                      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[ss_store_sk, ss_item_sk], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_sales_price)]
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=6882960
